---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Announcements

- Poster session on 6/9!
  - Feel free to bring food again!
  - A few faculty and staff will be joining us!
  - Will take place at VPT 515!!

## Key Dates

## Last class
